translations.en: I have to dispose of the trash.
translations.pt: Tenho que levar o lixo para fora.
translations.vi: Tôi phải mang rác đi đổ.
translations.ja: ゴミを出さなきゃいけない。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular, nominative; subject of the clause.
Modal auxiliary, finite present indicative (1st sg); expresses necessity and selects an infinitive complement ('entsorgen').
Definite article, accusative masculine singular; marks 'Müll' as the direct object.
Common noun (masculine), accusative singular; patient/theme of 'entsorgen'.
Lexical verb in bare infinitive; complement of the modal 'muss'; denotes the action of disposal and takes the accusative object 'den Müll'.

translations.en: We’re supposed to dispose of the batteries.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们得把电池拿去回收。
translations.yue: 我哋應該攞啲電池去回收。
translations.ru: Нам нужно сдать батарейки на переработку.
translations.vi: Chúng ta phải mang pin đi tái chế.
translations.ar: من المفترض أن نعيد تدوير البطاريات.
translations.nl: We moeten de batterijen inleveren voor recycling.
translations.uk: Ми маємо здати батарейки на переробку.
translations.hu: Le kell adnunk az elemeket újrahasznosításra.
translations.nb: Vi skal levere batteriene til gjenvinning.
translations.sv: Vi ska lämna in batterierna för återvinning.
translations.ro: Trebuie să ducem bateriile la reciclat.
translations.da: Vi skal aflevere batterierne til genbrug.
translations.ja: 電池はリサイクルに出さないといけない。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person plural, nominative; subject of the clause.
Modal auxiliary, finite present indicative (1st pl); expresses obligation/expectation and selects an infinitive complement ('entsorgen').
Definite article, accusative plural; marks 'Batterien' as the direct object.
Common noun (feminine), plural accusative; direct object of 'entsorgen'.
Lexical verb in bare infinitive; complement of the modal 'sollen'; action applied to 'die Batterien'.

sentences.target: Er will die alte Couch entsorgen.

translations.de: Er will die alte Couch entsorgen.
translations.en: He wants to dispose of the old couch.
translations.fr: Il veut se débarrasser du vieux canapé.
translations.ko: 그는 낡은 소파를 버리고 싶어 한다.
translations.zh-Hans: 他想处理掉那张旧沙发。
translations.ru: Он хочет избавиться от старого дивана.
translations.pt: Ele quer se desfazer do sofá velho.
translations.vi: Anh ấy muốn vứt chiếc ghế sofa cũ đi.
translations.ar: هو يريد التخلص من الأريكة القديمة.
translations.nl: Hij wil van de oude bank af.
translations.hu: Meg akar szabadulni a régi kanapétól.
translations.hi: वह पुराने सोफ़े से छुटकारा पाना चाहता है।
translations.pl: On chce pozbyć się starej kanapy.
translations.el: Θέλει να ξεφορτωθεί τον παλιό καναπέ.
translations.nb: Han vil bli kvitt den gamle sofaen.
translations.id: Dia ingin menyingkirkan sofa lama itu.
translations.sv: Han vill bli av med den gamla soffan.
translations.ro: Vrea să scape de canapeaua veche.
translations.da: Han vil af med den gamle sofa.
translations.fi: Hän haluaa hankkiutua eroon vanhasta sohvasta.
translations.ja: 彼は古いソファを処分したい。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 3rd person singular, nominative; subject of the clause.
Modal auxiliary, finite present indicative (3rd sg); expresses volition and selects an infinitive complement ('entsorgen').
Definite article, accusative feminine singular; marks 'Couch' as the direct object.
Attributive adjective, weak inflection (-e) with definite article; agrees with 'Couch' (fem, acc, sg).
Common noun (feminine), accusative singular; direct object modified by 'alte'.
Lexical verb in bare infinitive; complement of the modal 'will'; denotes the intended action applied to 'die alte Couch'.

sentences.target: Die Firma lässt den Sondermüll entsorgen.

translations.de: Die Firma lässt den Sondermüll entsorgen.
translations.en: The company is getting rid of the hazardous waste.
translations.es: La empresa está eliminando los residuos peligrosos.
translations.fr: L'entreprise se débarrasse des déchets dangereux.
translations.it: L'azienda sta smaltendo i rifiuti pericolosi.
translations.zh-Hans: 公司正在处理危险废物。
translations.yue: 公司正喺處理有害廢物。
translations.pt: A empresa está descartando os resíduos perigosos.
translations.vi: Công ty đang xử lý chất thải nguy hại.
translations.nl: Het bedrijf laat het gevaarlijke afval afvoeren.
translations.hu: A cég a veszélyes hulladékot ártalmatlanítja.
translations.hi: कंपनी खतरनाक कचरे का निपटान कर रही है।
translations.el: Η εταιρεία απομακρύνει τα επικίνδυνα απόβλητα.
translations.nb: Selskapet kvitter seg med farlig avfall.
translations.sv: Företaget gör sig av med det farliga avfallet.
translations.da: Virksomheden skaffer sig af med det farlige affald.
translations.ja: 会社は有害廃棄物を処理している。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, nominative feminine singular; marks 'Firma' as subject.
Common noun (feminine), nominative singular; syntactic subject of 'lässt'.
Causative lexical verb, finite present indicative (3rd sg); takes a bare infinitive complement ('entsorgen') and licenses the patient 'den Sondermüll' of the embedded verb.
Definite article, accusative masculine singular; marks 'Sondermüll' as patient of the embedded verb.
Compound common noun (masculine), accusative singular; semantic patient/theme of 'entsorgen'.
Bare infinitive complement (xcomp) of 'lässt'; denotes the action carried out by an unspecified agent on 'den Sondermüll'.

Die Firma lässt den Sondermüll entsorgen.
de: Er will die alte Couch entsorgen.
Die Firma lässt den Sondermüll entsorgen.

We’re supposed to dispose of the batteries.
He wants to dispose of the old couch.
The company is getting rid of the hazardous waste.
